title: helichrysum heterolasium
intro: Helichrysum heterolasium, also known as the yellow mountain curl, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum heterolasium include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic activities. Helichrysum heterolasium is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, which are used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, digestive problems, and respiratory infections.
